overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a bioluminescent tribal village at night. The character walks through wooden walkways, ascends stairs, and enters a sacred temple with an ornate domed ceiling and ritual altar.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village center with wooden walkways and arch structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village center, observing the bioluminescent surroundings and tribal architecture

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the wooden platform near a woven basket

entered.detail: massive curved wooden structure forming the main village entrance with woven bamboo details
green glowing lights attached to wooden posts illuminating the pathway
intricately carved wooden totem with tribal patterns and bone decorations
small dwellings with woven roofs and wooden supports

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through the open-air tribal village at night, passing under massive wooden archways illuminated by green bioluminescent lanterns. The wooden walkways are lined with carved totems and thatched huts, with a few villagers sitting peacefully nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stairway ascending to temple entrance

events.description: character transitions from walking on flat ground to climbing the wooden stairs
approaching the temple entrance archway at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep wooden stairs toward the elevated temple entrance

entered.detail: steep stairs constructed from wooden planks and bamboo with carved railings
decorated archway leading into the sacred temple structure

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep wooden staircase flanked by carved railings, moving from the open village into a more sheltered approach. The temple entrance arch becomes visible ahead as the ground level structures fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred temple interior with domed ceiling and ritual altar

events.description: entering the enclosed temple interior from the outdoor stairway
character stops walking and looks upward at the ornate domed ceiling

agents.ego_description: entering the sacred space, approaching the central altar, and examining the intricate ceiling architecture

entered.detail: intricate woven bamboo ceiling with colorful light filtering through the center
sacred shrine with glowing artifacts, offerings, and elaborate carvings
clay pots and woven baskets arranged around the altar containing offerings

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple, the space opens to reveal a magnificent domed ceiling with colored light filtering through. Aloy approaches the central altar adorned with ritual offerings and artifacts, pausing to look up at the intricate woven architecture above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bioluminescent tribal village that culminates in the discovery of a sacred interior temple. It begins with Aloy walking along open-air wooden walkways beneath massive archways lit by green lanterns, passing carved totems and peaceful villagers. As she moves forward, the camera ascends a steep wooden staircase with carved railings, leaving the village structures behind to approach a sheltered entrance. The scene then opens into the temple's interior, where the space expands to reveal a magnificent domed ceiling with filtering colored light. Finally, the camera follows her toward a central altar adorned with ritual offerings, pausing to look up at the intricate woven architecture above.
